name: Crowdsourcing
description: A Hyperion shotgun variant with a Bandit-style triple barrel, firing a dense, high-pellet spread for the cost of three shells per shot. It excels at close-range burst damage and stagger pressure, but it is not built for ammo efficiency in drawn-out fights.
notes: Similar triple-barrel variants exist in The Pre-Sequel, such as Focus Group. Here, it can spawn at green rarity or higher and is obtained through normal world drops. Its internal label includes "Tri Fusion Crowdsourcing," with the prefix swapped by the game engine.
